name: origin
description: Personal AI memory layer. Bundles the origin-mcp MCP server (auto-installed via npx) and adds 10 short skills for the user-facing verbs: /init, /help, /brief, /capture, /recall, /distill, /review, /forget, /handoff, /debrief. A SessionStart hook auto-detects daemon state. Talks to the local Origin daemon on 127.0.0.1:7878.
